languages.text: {n}Куравич осматривает себя и охает, как будто только сейчас заметил густо пропитанную кровью форму.{/n} "Не извольте беспокоиться. Меня не дырявили. Бойца тащил. До кости ее цапнули, вот и натекло... а что головой приложился, то это даже бодрит". {n}Он тычет пальцем в багровую припухлость и морщится.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Куравич осматривает себя и охает, как будто только сейчас заметил густо пропитанную кровью форму.{/n} "Не извольте беспокоиться. Меня не дырявили. Бойца тащил. До кости ее цапнули, вот и натекло... а что головой приложился, то это даже бодрит". {n}Он тычет пальцем в багровую припухлость и морщится.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Куравич осматривает себя и охает, как будто только сейчас заметил густо пропитанную кровью форму.{/n} "Не извольте беспокоиться. Меня не дырявили. Бойца тащил. До кости ее цапнули, вот и натекло... а что головой приложился, то это даже бодрит". {n}Он тычет пальцем в багровую припухлость и морщится.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and lets out a gasp, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself. I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... and as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite refreshing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... and as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite refreshing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

{n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

languages.text: {n}库拉维奇低头看了看自己，叹息一声，仿佛刚注意到自己那身浸透血污的制服。{/n}“您别担心，我没受伤。我刚才背了个士兵，她被咬得深可见骨，这才蹭了一身……至于我脑袋上挨得那一下，说实话还挺提神醒脑的。”{n}他伸手戳了戳那暗红肿胀的包，疼得直龇牙。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}库拉维奇低头看了看自己，叹息一声，仿佛刚注意到自己那身浸透血污的制服。{/n}“您别担心，我没受伤。我刚才背了个士兵，她被咬得深可见骨，这才蹭了一身……至于我脑袋上挨得那一下，说实话还挺提神醒脑的。”{n}他伸手戳了戳那暗红肿胀的包，疼得直龇牙。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kendine bakan Kuravich, kanlı üniformasını yeni fark etmiş gibi inliyor.{/n} "Zahmet olmasın, yaralı değilim. Askerlerden birini taşıyordum. Kemiklerine kadar ısırılmıştı, hepsi onun kanı... Kafamdaki darbe ise aslında oldukça canlandırıcı." {n}Kıpkırmızı şişliğe parmağını bastırıp yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kendine bakan Kuravich, kanlı üniformasını yeni fark etmiş gibi inliyor.{/n} "Zahmet olmasın, yaralı değilim. Askerlerden birini taşıyordum. Kemiklerine kadar ısırılmıştı, hepsi onun kanı... Kafamdaki darbe ise aslında oldukça canlandırıcı." {n}Kıpkırmızı şişliğe parmağını bastırıp yüzünü buruşturuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kuravich s'examine et pousse un grognement, comme s'il venait de remarquer que son uniforme est couvert de sang.{/n} « Ne vous inquiétez pas, je ne suis pas blessé. Je me suis mis dans cet état en portant un soldat qui s'est fait mordre jusqu'à l'os... Quant à ce coup que j'ai pris sur la tête, c'est pratique pour rester éveillé. » {n}Il appuie sur la contusion écarlate et grimace.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich s'examine et pousse un grognement, comme s'il venait de remarquer que son uniforme est couvert de sang.{/n} « Ne vous inquiétez pas, je ne suis pas blessé. Je me suis mis dans cet état en portant un soldat qui s'est fait mordre jusqu'à l'os... Quant à ce coup que j'ai pris sur la tête, c'est pratique pour rester éveillé. » {n}Il appuie sur la contusion écarlate et grimace.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kuravich se mira y gruñe, como si acabara de darse cuenta de que tiene el uniforme cubierto de sangre.{/n} «No se preocupe, no estoy herido. Es de llevar a una de mis soldados. Le llegó el mordisco al hueso, de ahí viene todo... En cuanto al golpe en la cabeza, es vivificante». {n}Se toca la hinchazón y hace un gesto de dolor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich se mira y gruñe, como si acabara de darse cuenta de que tiene el uniforme cubierto de sangre.{/n} «No se preocupe, no estoy herido. Es de llevar a una de mis soldados. Le llegó el mordisco al hueso, de ahí viene todo... En cuanto al golpe en la cabeza, es vivificante». {n}Se toca la hinchazón y hace un gesto de dolor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kuravich sieht an sich hinunter und stöhnt auf, als würde er erst jetzt seine blutgetränkte Uniform bemerken.{/n} "Keine Sorge, ich bin nicht verwundet. Ich habe eine der Soldatinnen getragen. Sie hat ziemlich was abgekriegt, dort fing alles an ... Was den Schlag auf meinen Kopf angeht, der tut ganz schön weh." {n}Er berührt mit einem Finger die Schwellung und zuckt zusammen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Kuravich looks himself over and groans, as if only now noticing his blood-soaked uniform.{/n} "Don't trouble yourself, I'm not wounded. I was carrying one of the soldiers. She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kuravich sieht an sich hinunter und stöhnt auf, als würde er erst jetzt seine blutgetränkte Uniform bemerken.{/n} "Keine Sorge, ich bin nicht verwundet. Ich habe eine der Soldatinnen getragen. Sie hat ziemlich was abgekriegt, dort fing alles an ... Was den Schlag auf meinen Kopf angeht, der tut ganz schön weh." {n}Er berührt mit einem Finger die Schwellung und zuckt zusammen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}クラビッチは自分の体をチェックし、血に染まった軍服に気づいたかのように呻き声を上げる。{/n}「心配しないで、私は傷ついていない。兵士の一人を運んでいたんだ。骨まで噛まれた。これが全てだ... 頭の打撲は、実はかなり気分が良くなる」{n}彼は赤い腫れを指さし、顔をしかめる。{/n}

She got bit to the bone, that's where all this came from... And as for the knock to my head, it's actually quite rousing." {n}He pokes a finger at the crimson swelling and winces.{/n}
